message.content:
@startuml
participant "Client" as C1
participant "Client" as C2
participant "Game" as G1
participant "Game" as G2
participant "Player" as P1
participant "Player" as P2

C1 ..> G1 : getScoreInformation()
G1 ..> P1 : _toString()
P1 ..> G1 : return $name
G1 ..> C2 : Score Information

@enduml
